title: justicia leucostachya
intro: Justicia leucostachya, also known as the 'Brahmimandala' or 'White Tufted Justicia', is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and has been used to treat various health issues such as fever, cough, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Justicia leucostachya include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and even help in lowering blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Justicia leucostachya include its use in teas, infusions, and decoctions, and it is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
